name: los-sartenes
description: Sistema de gestión de menú para Los Sartenes

scripts.build: echo 'Build step started...' && mkdir -p public && (cp -r components/ public/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No components to copy') && (cp -r images/ public/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No images to copy') && (cp -r admin/ public/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No admin files to copy') && (cp *.html public/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No HTML files to copy')
